items.title: Champions League semifinal live updates: Bayern Mu...
items.summary: Who will qualify for the Champions League final? Enjoy all the updates from the second leg of the semifinal tie between Bayern Munich and Paris Saint-Germain.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Mexican Federation Threatens To Exclude Liga MX-Based Players From 2026 World Cup
items.summary: The Mexican Football Federation has threatened to exclude any Liga MX-based player from the World Cup roster if they fail to report for national team duty by Wednesday night.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: 'We dropped too many catches' - Shreyas Iyer rues sloppy PBKS performance
items.summary: Punjab Kings dropped three catches and missed one stumping chance, as Sunrisers Hyderabad raced away to a 33-run win and the top of the table
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
